question: How many bikes did I service or plan to service in March?
reasoning_summary: The user had their road bike serviced at Pedal Power on March 10, 2023 (observed). The user also planned to replace the front tire of their commuter bike before April 2023 (planned). Both events involve distinct bikes (road bike and commuter bike). Chain cleaning/lubrication events are maintenance but not full service, and they pertain to the same road bike already counted. Therefore, the count of distinct bikes serviced or planned to service in March 2023 is 2.
